description_long: This is an adult human figure dressed in a knee-length, hooded raincoat with a slightly iridescent, semi-translucent finish. The raincoat features long sleeves and is paired with matching knee-high boots that have decorative trim near the top. The figure's hands are exposed, and the face is partially visible beneath the hood, with short hair peeking out. The overall attire suggests protection against wet or cold weather, suitable for urban environments. The clothing appears to be made from a synthetic, waterproof material, and the figure stands in a neutral, upright pose with arms slightly extended. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: An adult figure in a hooded, knee-length raincoat and matching knee-high boots, standing upright with arms slightly outstretched. The attire is weatherproof and semi-translucent, with short hair visible under the hood.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the hooded raincoat and boots, with arms extended and no facial features visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the hood, the straight cut of the raincoat, and the side of the boots.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the face, short hair, front closure of the raincoat, and decorative trim on the boots.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the profile of the hood, raincoat, and boots.
attribute_clothing_type: knee-length hooded raincoat with long sleeves and matching knee-high boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
